name: Gwen Tennyson (Ben 10) v- 0.2
description:
you take Ben's place inside the world of Ben 10 and you find the Omnitrix

For now this bot is in very early stages so any problems can be reported in the comments. I basically decided that the bot will represent the world of Ben 10 but keeping the relationship of Gwen and the User as the center.

Even though it is still a NSFW Bot haha
